task_completion.description: Verify that the parent Section 'Department Publications' is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation form for 'Department Publications' being filled out, or its properties/summary view showing the title and a description containing the keywords 'publication' and 'department'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the child Section 'Engineering' is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation form for 'Engineering' being filled out, or its properties/summary view showing the title and a description containing the keywords 'technical', 'specifications', and 'architecture'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the child Section 'Marketing' is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation form for 'Marketing' being filled out, or its properties/summary view showing the title and a description containing the keywords 'marketing', 'campaign', and 'brand'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the child Section 'Legal' is created with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation form for 'Legal' being filled out, or its properties/summary view showing the title and a description containing the keywords 'contracts', 'compliance', and 'regulatory'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Engineering', 'Marketing', and 'Legal' are located inside 'Department Publications', which is located in the root Sections area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the breadcrumbs (e.g., Sections > Department Publications > Engineering), the left navigation tree, or the folder contents of 'Department Publications' to confirm the correct parent-child relationships.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo web interface to create the sections.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with the Nuxeo web GUI (clicking 'New', filling forms, clicking 'Create') rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually navigated through the creation process in Nuxeo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for sequential screenshots showing the form filling and submission process, rather than a sudden appearance of the final state which might indicate DOM manipulation.

integrity.description: Check that the agent properly separated titles and descriptions into the correct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the creation forms to ensure the title is in the Title field and the description is in the Description field, not concatenated together.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Section: 'Department Publications' (Path: /default-domain/sections/Department-Publications, Description keywords: 'publication', 'department'). Child Sections: 1. 'Engineering' (Description keywords: 'technical', 'specifications', 'architecture'). 2. 'Marketing' (Description keywords: 'marketing', 'campaign', 'brand'). 3. 'Legal' (Description keywords: 'contracts', 'compliance', 'regulatory'). All child sections must be located inside the 'Department Publications' section.
